name: Georgette Kerr
title: Owner & Founder
credentials: Certified Postpartum Doula · Certified Gentle Sleep Coach · 25+ Years
bio: Georgette became a certified postpartum doula over 25 years ago and founded After the Stork out of a genuine desire to help new families through the postpartum period. She built this business slowly and organically — moms sharing her phone number with friends, one family at a time. Georgette has four grown children and seven grandchildren of her own. She attended the intensive Gentle Sleep Coach training program and makes herself available to all After the Stork families to guide and troubleshoot through infant sleep issues at no additional charge. Her standard is excellence, and that has earned After the Stork the LOVE Award in 2020, 2021, 2022, and 2024.

name: Ashley Morrison
title: General Manager
credentials: Certified Postpartum Doula · Elementary Education · Child Development
bio: Ashley is Georgette's oldest daughter and has been a nurturer her entire life. She spent her early college years as a full-time nanny, went on to become an elementary school teacher with extensive training in child development, and received her postpartum doula training fifteen years ago. Now a mother of four children ranging from seven to sixteen years old, Ashley brings a grounded, practical understanding of family life to managing After the Stork's day-to-day operations.

name: Allison Hart, MS RD IBCLC
title: Lactation Consultant
credentials: MS Dietetics, West Chester University · Registered Dietitian · IBCLC
bio: Allison is Georgette's youngest daughter. She earned her master's degree in dietetics from West Chester University, became a Registered Dietitian, and then earned her IBCLC credential — the highest level of breastfeeding training available. "Your goals are our goals" is her mantra. She supports moms in achieving their breastfeeding goals while also helping them care for their own postpartum health and nutrition. She has two young children of her own.

name: Doula Team Member
title: Postpartum Doula
bio: A member of the After the Stork care team, bringing warmth, expertise, and dedication to every family we serve.
